description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - OSX/Linux via Conda that runs on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.12 in both Release and Debug build types. For each job, check out the repository, set up Miniconda, and build Pinocchio with ccache and CMake. Also, run a separate check job that depends on the build job.
